App and process management in Pebble firmware, including installation, lifecycle, metadata, and communication.


## Files
- **[app_custom_icon.c](app_custom_icon.c.md)**: Manages customizable app names and icons for specific app types in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_custom_icon.h](app_custom_icon.h.md)**: Provides a Pebble protocol endpoint for third-party apps to customize titles and icons of stock apps.
- **[app_install_manager.c](app_install_manager.c.md)**: Manages app installation, prioritization, and deletion, including handling app callbacks and maintaining a cache of recent apps.
- **[app_install_manager.h](app_install_manager.h.md)**: Manages app installations, providing structures and functions for tracking, accessing, and modifying app metadata.
- **[app_install_manager_known_apps.h](app_install_manager_known_apps.h.md)**: Defines UUIDs and color codes for known apps in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_install_manager_private.h](app_install_manager_private.h.md)**: Private functions for managing app installation callbacks in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_install_types.h](app_install_types.h.md)**: Defines `AppInstallId` type and functions to check if an app ID is system or user-installed.
- **[app_manager.c](app_manager.c.md)**: Manages application lifecycle, including starting, stopping, and switching apps on the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_manager.h](app_manager.h.md)**: Header file for managing app lifecycle in Pebble firmware, including launch, close, and event handling.
- **[app_menu_data_source.c](app_menu_data_source.c.md)**: Manages app menu data sources, including app installation, removal, and icon handling for Pebble firmware.
- **[app_menu_data_source.h](app_menu_data_source.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing and displaying a menu of installed apps in system applications.
- **[app_run_state.c](app_run_state.c.md)**: Manages application run state commands and communication for Pebble firmware.
- **[app_run_state.h](app_run_state.h.md)**: Defines enums and functions for managing app run states and commands between a watch and phone.
- **[launch_config.h](launch_config.h.md)**: Defines the `LaunchConfigCommon` structure for app launch configuration with reason, button, args, and transition.
- **[launcher_app_message.c](launcher_app_message.c.md)**: Manages app state communication between a phone and a watch, including launching and stopping apps.
- **[launcher_app_message.h](launcher_app_message.h.md)**: Deprecated function for sending application state messages using the LauncherAppMessage endpoint.
- **[pebble_process_info.c](pebble_process_info.c.md)**: Compares two version structures by their major and minor numbers.
- **[pebble_process_info.h](pebble_process_info.h.md)**: Defines structures and flags for managing application metadata in Pebble firmware.
- **[pebble_process_md.c](pebble_process_md.c.md)**: Functions for accessing and initializing metadata of Pebble processes, including version and platform details.
- **[pebble_process_md.h](pebble_process_md.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing process metadata in Pebble firmware.
- **[process_heap.c](process_heap.c.md)**: Exception handlers for double free and heap corruption in process management.
- **[process_heap.h](process_heap.h.md)**: Configures exception handlers for app and worker heaps in process management.
- **[process_loader.h](process_loader.h.md)**: Function to load a process image into memory, returning the entry point or NULL on failure.
- **[process_manager.c](process_manager.c.md)**: Manages process lifecycle and interactions in the Pebble firmware, including launching, closing, and event handling for apps and workers.
- **[process_manager.h](process_manager.h.md)**: Header file for managing processes in Pebble firmware, including process lifecycle and event handling.
- **[sdk_memory_limits.template.h](sdk_memory_limits.template.h.md)**: Defines memory limit macros for SDK applications based on SDK version and platform.
- **[sdk_shims.c](sdk_shims.c.md)**: Provides a function to retrieve the current graphics context from the app state.
- **[sdk_shims.h](sdk_shims.h.md)**: Provides a function to get the current graphics context for use in drawing callbacks.
- **[sdk_version.c](sdk_version.c.md)**: Checks if app messaging is supported based on the SDK version.
- **[sdk_version.h](sdk_version.h.md)**: Checks if the SDK version supports app messaging in Pebble applications.
- **[worker_manager.c](worker_manager.c.md)**: Manages worker processes in the Pebble firmware, including launching, closing, and handling crashes.
- **[worker_manager.h](worker_manager.h.md)**: Functions for managing worker processes, including initialization, launching, and termination.
